highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

overview.about: Historic Jérémie Shopping District is one of HT's most celebrated city destination destinations, located in Jérémie, HT. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Iconic Skyline & Architecture
highlights.desc: A skyline recognised across the globe — towers, bridges and boulevards that define an entire era of human design

highlights.label: World-Class Arts & Culture
highlights.desc: World-class museums, galleries, theatres and street art that shape global trends in fashion, film and music

highlights.label: Legendary Cuisine & Markets
highlights.desc: A melting pot of culinary traditions — street food, fine dining and bustling markets all within easy reach

highlights.label: Vibrant Nightlife & Events
highlights.desc: Rooftop bars, jazz clubs, night markets and international festivals keep the city electric long after dark

overview.about: New Jacmel Cathedral is one of HT's most celebrated heritage landmark destinations, located in Jacmel, HT. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Centuries of Living History
highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Royal Cap-Haïtien Beach is one of HT's most celebrated beach paradise destinations, located in Cap-Haïtien, HT. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Pristine Award-Winning Shores
highlights.desc: Crystal-clear azure waters fringing powder-white sands — consistently ranked among the world's most stunning coastlines

highlights.desc: Snorkelling, scuba diving, surfing and sailing in ideal conditions — equipment and instructors available year-round
